signals.headline: Wembanyama Concussion Rules Him Out After Game 2 Fall | YES (Spurs series now favors Trail Blazers) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Concussion Rules Him Out After Game 2 Fall | YES (Spurs series now favors Trail Blazers) | HIGH confidence** [4]  
Victor Wembanyama, San Antonio Spurs' rookie star and MVP finalist, suffered a concussion in Game 2 of their Western Conference semifinals vs. Portland Trail Blazers and was ruled out immediately, shifting series prediction markets toward Portland.[4]

signals.raw:
Knicks Blow 12-Point Lead in Game 2 vs. Hawks | NO (Knicks series win odds drop) | MED confidence** [2][4]  
New York Knicks collapsed in the fourth quarter of Game 2 vs. Atlanta Hawks (lost 107-106), with coach Mike Brown criticized for poor decisions, weakening their Eastern Conference series outlook.[2][4]
